Event: Cornucopia Island February 2026
Event Date: 05/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: A309
Benefactor of the Tribe

Triggers: Once in a while

Tsunami
A wave sweeps across the field. When the wave passes through allied units, all fire and incineration effects are removed from them, they restore 35% health, and all their stats are increased by 25% for 5 sec. When the wave passes through enemy units, 4 random positive effects are removed from each of them, the damage they take is increased by 60 for 5 sec., and all their stats are reduced by 25% for 5 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
